playbooks.name: SQLite Database Lock Recovery
steps: Identify locked database file from error message.
Attempt to close any dangling connections in the current process.
If persistent, wait 2 seconds and retry operation once.

playbooks.name: External API Timeout Recovery
steps: Switch to fallback model if original provider (OpenAI/Gemini) remains unresponsive.
Alert user via Inner State if latency exceeds 30s.

playbooks.name: Circular Import Resolution
steps: Move necessary import inside a function scope (local import) if safe.

playbooks.name: Memory Cache Corruption Recovery
steps: Wipe local .cache or temporary memory JSON files.
Re-init memory from the most recent stable SQLite backup.
